Pricing built for businesses of all sizes

Standard

Access a complete payments platform with simple, pay-as-you-go pricing. No setup fees, monthly fees, or hidden fees.
Get started 

3.4% + $0.50

per successful transaction for domestic cards

Custom

Design a custom package – available for businesses with large payments volume or unique business models.
Contact sales 
IC+ pricing
Volume discounts
Multi-product discounts
Country-specific rates
Standard pricing Custom pricing FAQs

Features available out of the box:

Global access

  • 195 countries
  • 135+ currencies
  • 100+ payment methods
  • 1 integration

Built-in fraud prevention

  • Powerful machine learning
  • Adapts to new fraud patterns
  • No integration required
  • Fraud analytics

Tools to optimise your checkout

  • Flexible UI components
  • Pre-built payment forms
  • Accelerated checkout
  • No-code payments

Payments optimisations to boost revenue

  • Real-time retries
  • Auto-updated cards
  • Customer authentication

Embedded payments for platforms & marketplaces

  • Instant onboarding
  • Platform management
  • Embedded components
  • Risk tools

Fast, predictable payouts to your bank accounts

  • Flexible payout options
  • Like-for-like settlement
  • Payout transparency

Phone, chat, and email support

  • 24x7 support
  • Industry-leading documentation
  • Technical support on Discord

Security, reliability and compliance

  • 99.999% average historical uptime
  • PCI compliant
  • Regulatory licences globally
  • Standard pricing
  • Custom pricing
  • FAQs
Contact sales 

Standard pricing for all products

Explore pricing for the full Stripe platform

Online and in-person payments, recurring billing, embedded payments, and much more.

  • Global payments

Custom pricing

Global payments

Optimise checkout conversion, accept local payment methods, and increase acceptance rates.

Payments

An online payments platform engineered for growth. 

Start now 
  • Increase customer acquisition with 100+ payment methods.
  • Improve conversion with Link - Stripe’s accelerated checkout.
  • Reduce fraud and increase revenue with ML optimisations.
  • Save engineering time with pre-built UIs. 

Credit and debit cards

Accept widely used credit and debit cards and prepaid cards for online payments.

3.4% + $0.50

per successful transaction for domestic cards
3.4% + US$0.50

per successful card charge when settled in USD
+ 0.5%

for international cards*
+ 2%

if currency conversion is required

Bank-based and other payment methods

Offer bank debits, bank transfers, and other locally relevant payment methods.

1.3%

per successful PayNow transfer.

 See more payment methods 

Digital wallets

Offer your customers a quick and convenient way to pay with digital wallets

2.2% + $0.35

Alipay

Cards pricing applies to Apple Pay and Google Pay.
2.2% + $0.35

WeChat Pay

Cards pricing applies to Apple Pay and Google Pay.
3.3%

GrabPay

Cards pricing applies to Apple Pay and Google Pay.

Disputes

Understand and effectively respond to disputes on card transactions (also known as chargebacks) through a guided process.

Countering rare dispute types may incur network fees.
Learn more

$15.00

per dispute received.

Fighting rare dispute types may incur network fees
Fee for countering disputes manually $15.00

fee charged when you submit evidence

If you win, the fee is returned. If you lose, the fee is not returned

 Learn more 

Smart Disputes

Automatically compiles and submits evidence to fight eligible disputes for you using Stripe’s AI (public preview)

Sign up for the waiting list.

Countering with Smart Disputes 30%

of the disputed amount charged if you win

If you lose, no fees are charged for Smart Disputes

 Learn more 
Included with Payments 

3D Secure authentication

Verify a customer's identity using 3D Secure, an authentication method, before an online card purchase.

Included

with Payments

 
$0.04

per 3D Secure attempt for accounts with custom pricing.
Learn more 

Authorisation Boost

Increase acceptance rates and reduce card processing costs with AI-powered payment optimisations, inclusive of Adaptive Acceptance, card account updater and network tokens.

Individual pricing available for Adaptive Acceptance, card account updater and network tokens.

Included

with Payments

 
0.2%

per successful online card transaction for accounts with custom payments pricing
Learn more 

USD payouts

Payout US dollars to your local bank account.

1%

of USD payout volume
Minimum fee of US$5.00
Learn more 

Adaptive Pricing

Present prices in local currencies to your customers, tailoring customer experience and increasing revenue.

Included

with Payments

 
Customers will be presented a conversion fee starting at 2%
Learn more 

Instant payouts

Access funds within minutes through an eligible debit card or bank account. Alternatively, pay out your funds on our standard schedule for free.

1%

of Instant Payouts volume
Minimum fee of $0.50
Learn more 

Instant currency conversion

Convert currencies instantly from your multi-currency settlement funds within your payments balance.

Starting at 0.35%

of the converted amount

 Learn more 

Vault and Forward API

Route payment requests to other processors while tokenising and storing card details in Stripe's PCI-compliant vault.

Contact sales

Contact your Stripe representative or Stripe support.

 Learn more 

Payment Links

No-code links to sell online without a website.

Start now 
  • Accept payments in minutes by generating no-code links. 
  • Sell products, offer subscriptions, and more.
  • Create at scale via our API to automate marketing campaigns and sales operations.

Accept payments

Accept payments made using a payment link.

Included

with Payments

 

Custom domain

Use your own domain while hosting your payments page or customer portal on Stripe.

US$10.00

per month

 Learn more 

Post-payment invoices

Automatically generate an invoice after a one-off purchase.

0.4%

on transaction total
US$2.00

cap per invoice

 Learn more 

Checkout

Pre-built payment form optimised for conversion.

Start now 
  • Save engineering time and get started quickly.
  • Reduce friction with features designed to improve conversion. 
  • Customise with your branding.

Accept payments

Accept payments made on Stripe Checkout.

Included

with Payments

 

Custom domain

Use your own domain while hosting your payments page or customer portal on Stripe.

US$10.00

per month

 Learn more 

Post-payment invoices

Automatically generate an invoice after a one-off purchase.

0.4%

on transaction total
US$2.00

cap per invoice

 Learn more 

Managed Payments

Stripe's merchant of record solution that simplifies global selling.

Start now 
  • Quickly launch or expand your businesses worldwide with no additional setup.
  • Offload tax compliance, fraud, disputes, and customer support responsibilities.
  • Use Managed Payments for all your transactions or just for specific markets and products.

Merchant of record services

A complete merchant of record solution for global digital commerce. Includes indirect tax compliance (sales tax, VAT, GST) and remittance in more than 75 countries, along with fraud prevention, dispute management, invoicing, and customer support globally.

3.5%

per successful Managed Payments transaction in addition to Payments fees

 Learn more 

Terminal

Tools to accept in-person payments and unify commerce.

Start now 
  • Build a custom checkout or integrate with hundreds of third-party POS systems.
  • Streamline hardware logistics with pre-certified Stripe or select 3P card readers.
  • Unify online and in-person payments to create a cohesive customer experience.
  • Scale globally with one integration.

Cards and wallets

Accept widely used credit cards, debit cards, and digital wallets for in-person payments.

3.4% + $0.50

per successful charge for domestic cards
+ 0.5%

for international cards
+ $0.15

per authorisation for Tap to Pay

 
+ $0.07

per authorisation for optional point-to-point-encryption

 

Card readers

Use pre-certified card readers with cloud-based fleet management that streamlines device logistics and management at scale.

$89.00

BBPOS WisePad 3

Excl. VAT
$389.00

Stripe Reader S710

Excl. VAT
$389.00

Stripe Reader S700

Excl. VAT

Mobile

Unlimited cellular data usage on enabled readers. Apps on Device data usage limited to 10 GB per reader per month.

$13.00

per reader per month
See pricing details 

Radar

Advanced fraud detection and prevention tools.

Start now 
  • Reduce fraud with ML powered by the Stripe network.
  • Customise fraud prevention by creating custom rules.
  • Get rich fraud insights for more efficient and accurate manual reviews.

Radar’s machine learning

Fraud protection powered by billions of data points across the Stripe network.

Included

For accounts with all payment methods on standard pricing
$0.08

per screened transaction for accounts with custom pricing for any payment method

Radar for Fraud Teams

Advanced fraud protection tools allowing for greater control and customisable settings. Includes Radar’s machine learning.

Support for Radar risk scores for non-Stripe transactions is available. Contact sales to learn more.

Try for free for 30 days
$0.02

per screened transaction for accounts with all payment methods on standard pricing
$0.10

per screened transaction for accounts with custom pricing for any payment method

Dispute prevention

Help reduce dispute rates with dispute prevention tools powered by Verifi from Visa and Ethoca from Mastercard. Request access.

Included

Dispute deflection lookups
$15.00

per Visa resolution
$15.00

per Visa Compelling Evidence 3.0 block
$29.00

per Mastercard resolution
See pricing details 

Money management

Enhance your platform by embedding financial services – set up financial accounts, issue cards, and offer financing.

Connect

Embedded payments for platforms and marketplaces.

Start now 
  • Launch faster with Stripe-hosted or pre-built embedded components.
  • Save time by using tooling from Stripe for onboarding, risk, tax forms and more.
  • Grow revenue by monetising payments.

Stripe handles pricing for your users

Stripe sets and collects processing fees from your users, so you don’t have to. Learn more about how to qualify for a revenue share from Stripe.

Included

with Payments

 
0.25%

starting fee for platforms that deploy their own payments pricing to earn revenue on each transaction.
See pricing details 

Revenue and finance automation

Streamline critical business processes with modular billing, tax, revenue reporting, and data analysis tools that work seamlessly together.

Billing

Subscription management software for recurring, usage-based, and one-time billing.

Start now 
  • Respond to user demand faster with flexible pricing models.
  • Increase revenue and reduce churn with Smart Retries and recovery workflow automations.
  • Save engineering time with no-code tools or our composable APIs.

Access to Billing

Start billing for recurring subscriptions & usage based billing.

0.7%

of Billing volume

  See pricing details 

Invoicing

Global invoicing software.

Start now 
  • Create, customise, and send an invoice in minutes – no code required.
  • Save time with automated accounts receivable and invoicing workflows.
  • Configure invoices for any use case.

Starter

Invoicing features to get started quickly.

0.4%

per paid invoice

 See pricing details 

Tax

Automated tax calculation and collection.

Start now 
  • Get started in minutes with no-code and low-code setups.
  • Stay automatically up to date with global tax rules and rates.
  • Increase finance team efficiency by easily filing and remitting taxes.

Turn Tax on from your Dashboard or with a single line of code

Tax is built into a number of Stripe products, including Billing, Invoicing, Checkout, and Payment Links.

0.5%

per transaction, where you’re registered to collect taxes

Integrate Tax with custom checkout or payment flows

Stripe Tax works with Stripe Payments APIs and can calculate and report tax on any payment processor.

$0.70

per transaction, where you’re registered to collect taxes

 
See pricing details 

Stripe Sigma

An interactive SQL environment for analysing your Stripe data and creating custom reports.

Start now 
  • Get faster, more comprehensive insights using SQL or AI-powered natural language prompts.
  • Make confident, data-driven decisions with fully customisable reporting.
  • Keep teams in sync and save time with scheduled reports.

Access to Stripe Sigma

Start exploring your business data.

Try for free for 30 days
Starting at $15.00

per month, infrastructure fee
Plus a fee per charge starting at + $0.03
See pricing details 

Data Pipeline

Send Stripe data and reports directly to your data warehouse or cloud storage.

Start now 
  • Set up your pipeline in minutes and automate data delivery – no code required.
  • Speed up your financial close and access more complete business insights.
  • Offload ongoing maintenance with a pipeline that's built into Stripe.

Access to Data Pipeline

Centralise your Stripe data with other business data.

Try for free for 30 days
$0.03

per transaction

 See pricing details 

Revenue Recognition

Automated revenue reporting to streamline accrual accounting.

Start now 
  • Close books quickly and accurately with automated accounting reports and dashboards.
  • Easily review finances and audit in real time.
  • Stay compliant with ASC 606 and IFRS 15.

Access to Revenue Recognition

Simplify accrual accounting.

Try for free for 30 days
0.25%

of volume

 See pricing details 

More

Atlas

Software to quickly incorporate your startup.

Start now 
  • File your incorporation paperwork in minutes.
  • Use documents trusted by law firms, tax attorneys, and venture capital investors.
  • Get over $50K in discounts and perks.

Incorporate your company

Incorporate your company, get your EIN, issue equity, and file your 83(b) tax election.

US$500.00

one-off setup fee (includes government fees and your first year of registered agent services)

 See pricing details 

Workflows

Automate tasks and create custom flows, without writing code.

Start now 
  • Automate business processes with 600+ event triggers.
  • Eliminate boilerplate code with visual workflow builder.
  • Extend Stripe capabilities by connecting third-party applications.
  • Monitor and debug with built-in logging and versioning.

Pay as you go

No commitment, no recurring fees. Start building workflows today.

Included

10,000 steps per month
$0.023

per additional step

 See pricing details

Custom pricing

Join leading enterprises on Stripe

Create tailored solutions to help you expand into new markets, optimise payments performance, automate revenue and finance workflows, monetise financial services, and more.

Contact sales 

Build your custom package

Work with our sales team to design a solution that meets your needs:

  • Payments
  • Radar
  • Connect
  • Invoicing
  • Billing
  • and more

Get the support you need

  • Technical account management
  • Professional Services
  • Certified implementation partners

Flexible structures

IC+ pricing, discounted flat rates, subscriptions, and buy-rates for platforms.

Volume-based discounts

Discounts based on volume tiers, commitments, and product usage.

Global single rates

Optional aggregated pricing for all markets, allowing you to go global with ease.

Cost transparency

Dashboards, tools, and APIs that give you transparency into your costs.

Integrating Stripe provides a 326% return on investment

Forrester’s Total Economic Impact study suggests a more than 3x return on investment among businesses that deployed Stripe. 

Read the report 

Report

The Total Economic Impact™ Of Stripe

100+ category leaders each process more than $1 billion per year on Stripe.

Millions

BMW owners using ConnectedDrive Store

350+

US dealerships

Products used

  • Connect

5+

Amazon businesses on Stripe including Prime, Audible, and Amazon Pay.

50+

Payment methods available on Stripe

Products used

  • Payments
  • Connect

130

Countries in logistics network

$10B+

Worth of goods moved around the world each year

Products used

  • Connect

+5.5%

Uplift from Stripe's Global Payments Infrastructure

+1%

Uplift from Adaptive Acceptance

Read story 

See how Amazon simplified cross-border payments with Stripe
Read story 

See how Maersk tapped into new technology to make it easier to ship around the world
Read story 

See how Twilio increased authorisation rates by 10% with Stripe

FAQs

Stripe charges a per-transaction fee depending on the payment method used by the end customer. More details on fees by payment method.

Stripe is required to charge tax on certain products and services. Tax is charged based on your location and/ or your business/tax status, which determines whether a product or service is subject to taxes, and the applicable tax rates.

Read more

  • For businesses on standard pricing: There may be fees for refunds when bank transfers are used.For all other payment methods, there are no fees for issuing refunds. The payment processing, connect and currency conversion fees from the original transaction are not returned.
  • For businesses on custom pricing: There may be fees for issuing refunds depending on your fee schedule with Stripe.

Stripe does not charge setup fees, monthly fees, or any other hidden fees like closure fees. All fees for businesses on standard pricing are listed on our website.

Stripe offers custom pricing for businesses with large processing volumes. Eligibility varies by market.

Ready to get started? Get in touch or create an account.

Access a complete payments platform with simple, pay-as-you-go pricing, or contact us to design a custom package specifically for your business.

Start now  Contact sales 

See our customers

From startups to Fortune 500s, explore how millions of businesses use Stripe to start and scale their companies.

Learn more 

Explore the docs

Start building your integration and accept your first payment in minutes. Stripe libraries are available in every language from Ruby to Go.

Read the docs 

¹ Stripe Radar for Fraud teams and Stripe Connect with platform-controlled pricing are priced separately.
